title: 皐月賞の後に・汝が吼えるは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking the Satsuki Sho by storm, Yaeno
Muteki lets out a triumphant roar. Then,
announcing her intention to win the Japanese
Derby, she showcases an intense desire for the
second crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan is disappointed with her
loss at the Satsuki Sho, her steady strides away
from the track are a sure sign of her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We vow to capitalize on what we've learned
today to ensure promising results at both the
Aoba Sho and the Japanese Derby to follow.
